Metadata.title: BTC Tax Consultant — Certified Brevet C | PT Bintang Konsultama Prima
Metadata.description: BTC Tax Consultant (PT Bintang Konsultama Prima) assists individuals and businesses in fulfilling all tax obligations, backed by over 20 years of professional experience. Certified Brevet C consultants licensed by the Director General of Taxes, Ministry of Finance.
Metadata.ogTitle: BTC Tax Consultant — Certified Brevet C Tax Consultants
Metadata.ogDescription: Professional tax consultation services backed by over 20 years of experience.

Hero.sub: BTC Tax Consultant (PT Bintang Konsultama Prima) assists individuals and businesses in fulfilling all tax obligations in Indonesia.

Services.label: Our Services
Services.title: End-to-End Tax Solutions
Services.sub: Comprehensive tax administration and legal representation for individuals and businesses.

Consultants.label: Our Consultants
Consultants.title: Meet the Team
Consultants.sub: Licensed professionals with multi expertise in tax, law, accounting, business, management, and academia.

bg.bio: Certified Brevet C tax consultant licensed by the Director General of Taxes, Ministry of Finance. Lecturer at university. An active member of the Indonesian Tax Consultant Association (IKPI) and Institute of Indonesia Chartered Accountants (IAI).

ts.bio: Certified Brevet C tax consultant licensed by the Director General of Taxes, Ministry of Finance. A registered advocate and legal consultant. Lecturer at university. An active member of the Indonesian Tax Consultant Association (IKPI) and the Indonesian Advocates Association (PERADI).

Clients.label: Our Clients
Clients.title: Trusted Across Industries
Clients.desc: We have assisted companies ranging from publicly listed entities to those across diverse sectors throughout Indonesia.

Contact.label: Contact
Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.sub: Reach out via phone, email, or visit our office (with prior appointment).
Contact.about: BTC Tax Consultant (PT Bintang Konsultama Prima) is a tax consultancy owned and managed by Berelli Ginting and Timbang Siahaan, both certified Brevet C tax consultants. Kindly send us an email or WhatsApp message for consultation and further information.
